name: Bulghur"meat"balls with Fresh Vegetable Sauc
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Green bell pepper, cut into 1/4-inch strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Combine the cooked bulghur wheat, tofu, breadcrumbs, salt, soy sauce, green onions, coriander, and thyme in a large bowl. Shape the mixture into 1 1/2-inch balls.
3. Bake the meatballs on an oiled cookie sheet for 10 minutes on each side.
4. In a large skillet over medium-high heat, combine vegetable stock and 1 1/3 cups apple juice; bring to a boil.
5. Reduce the heat to low and add carrots, cooking for 3 minutes. Add green pepper strips and cook an additional 4-6 minutes, or until vegetables are tender-crisp.
6. In a small bowl, combine cornstarch with 3 tablespoons apple juice; blend well. Stir into the vegetable mixture and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until thickened, stirring often.
7. Add ground black pepper and mix well.
8. Serve by placing hot cooked rice on a large platter, arranging the bulghur "meat"balls on top, and pouring the hot vegetable sauce over the meatballs.
